name: Clover Credit Solutions
description_short: Clover Credit Solutions disputes errors and negative items on credit reports to improve client credit scores. Founded in 2020, the company is led by a certified credit consultant with 13+ years of industry experience.
description_long:
Clover Credit Solutions is a credit repair company founded in 2020 and based in The Woodlands, Texas. The company is owned and operated by Miraily Reyes, a Cuban-born certified credit consultant with over 13 years of experience in the credit restoration industry. The firm positions itself around three core values: transparency, integrity, and education, with a stated mission to "change lives one credit report at a time" and help clients achieve financial freedom.

The company offers a three-step credit restoration process: (1) Credit Evaluation—obtaining and reviewing credit reports from all three major bureaus to create a personalized improvement plan; (2) Correct Errors—disputing negative and erroneous information directly with credit bureaus and creditors; and (3) Optimization—working to maximize credit scores and teaching clients how to maintain good credit long-term. Clients receive 24/7 online account access to track real-time updates on their credit reports and scores. The team works directly with credit bureaus and creditors to challenge inaccuracies affecting credit scores.

Clover Credit Solutions distinguishes itself through personalized service tailored to individual circumstances, staff certifications in credit consulting, and a money-back guarantee if they cannot meet client expectations. The company emphasizes client education and long-term financial empowerment rather than quick fixes. They also offer multiple contact channels (live chat, email, office visits, social media) and maintain compliance with federal regulations regarding client communications.

The company's website provides substantial information about their process and values, though specific pricing details are not transparently displayed on the main pages reviewed. Results and timelines for credit improvement are not explicitly guaranteed or detailed. As with all credit repair services, outcomes depend on the accuracy of disputes and the responsiveness of credit bureaus, which are outside the company's direct control.
address: 340 N Sam Houston Pkwy E Ste A1022, Houston, TX 77060

company_info.headquarters: 340 N Sam Houston Pkwy E Ste A1022, Houston, TX 77060

pros: Owner and senior consultant are both certified credit consultants with 13+ years combined industry experience
Three-step transparent process: evaluation, dispute, and optimization with client education
24/7 online account access for real-time tracking of credit report improvements and score changes
Money-back guarantee if company cannot meet client expectations
Multiple contact options for prospective clients (live chat, email, office visits, social media)
Emphasis on transparency, integrity, and financial education beyond just dispute filing
Works directly with both credit bureaus and creditors to challenge negative items
cons: Pricing information is not transparently displayed on the website—clients must inquire separately
No specific timeline or success rate data provided for credit score improvements
Federal regulations restrict phone communication to enrolled clients only, limiting initial conversations
Company founded in 2020, so relatively newer compared to some established credit repair firms
Website contains some formatting inconsistencies and repeated text that suggest incomplete or rushed development
best_for: Consumers with errors or inaccuracies on their credit reports who want personalized dispute assistance
Individuals seeking credit improvement with emphasis on financial education and long-term habits
People preparing for major financial goals like homeownership, auto purchase, or refinancing
diagnosis: Clover Credit Solutions is best for consumers with genuine errors or inaccurate negative items on their credit reports who want hands-on dispute assistance from certified professionals. The main caveat is that credit repair results depend entirely on the legitimacy of disputes and credit bureau responsiveness—no company can guarantee specific score increases or remove accurate negative information, and pricing should be clarified upfront before enrollment.
services: Credit report evaluation and analysis from all three major bureaus
Personalized credit improvement planning and strategy
Dispute filing with credit bureaus on negative and erroneous items
24/7 online account access and real-time credit report monitoring
Credit score tracking and status updates
Client education on credit rights and long-term credit maintenance
Consultation and planning services prior to enrollment
Money-back guarantee if expectations are not met
